cleavage agent: digested by incubating each gel slice with 10 ng/µL of trypsin
fragmentation method: top 12 ions were selected from fragmentation in HCD mode
instrument: nanospray Q-Exactive hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: nanospray Q-Exactive hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: metabolically labeled using stable isotope labeling with amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)
